overall.description: A cinematic third-person scene from a survival horror game showing a protagonist in a dark coat standing in tall grass at night, overlooking a foggy rural village with a large twisted dead tree formation and distant torchlight. The atmosphere is tense with heavy fog, moonlight, and bare autumn trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy field edge overlooking a rural village

agents.ego_description: standing in tall grass at the edge of a field, facing a distant village with a large twisted tree formation

entered.detail: large gnarled dead tree stump with twisted branches silhouetted against the moonlit sky
cluster of wooden structures with warm orange torchlight glowing from windows
leafless tree with twisted branches reaching into the foggy night sky
narrow dirt trail leading toward the village on the right side of the frame
tall wild grass in the foreground swaying slightly in the fog
dark silhouetted mountains visible in the far background behind the village

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a foggy night in a rural area, with the player character standing in tall grass at the edge of a field. A massive twisted dead tree dominates the center background, while a village with glowing torchlights sits to the right. The atmosphere is still and tense, with bare trees and distant mountains barely visible through the heavy fog and moonlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, atmospheric vista of a desolate rural landscape shrouded in a heavy nocturnal fog. It begins with a wide view of a protagonist standing motionless in tall grass at the edge of a field, framed by the oppressive stillness of the night. As the camera lingers, the gaze is drawn toward a massive, twisted dead tree that dominates the center of the horizon under the pale glow of the moonlight. The scene then expands to reveal a distant village to the right, where flickering torchlights pierce through the haze, while the silhouettes of bare trees and remote mountains remain barely visible in the background.
